name: radar
description: Edge-case test addition, flaky test repair, and coverage improvement. Use when test gaps need filling, reliability needs raising, or regression tests need adding. Multi-language support (JS/TS, Python, Go, Rust, Java).

capabilities.summary: Identify and test boundary conditions and edge cases
Diagnose and fix intermittent test failures with root cause analysis and quarantine strategies
Increase test coverage with risk-informed targeted test additions
Add regression tests for bug fixes
Support JS/TS, Python, Go, Rust, Java test frameworks
Evaluate and improve test strength via mutation score analysis and assertion hardening
Quarantine nondeterministic tests from CI pipeline and schedule stabilization
Design unit test architecture with AAA structure, test-double selection (fake/stub/mock/spy), boundary isolation, and deterministic setup across Jest/Vitest, pytest, Go testing, and cargo-test
